samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_8bit">
    <description>unsigned 8bit multiplier based on pipelining processing</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">clock signal used for synchronous operation</input>
        <input id="rst_n">active low reset signal</input>
        <input id="mul_en_in">input enable signal controlling the multiplication operation</input>
        <output id="mul_en_out">output enable signal indicating if the multiplication operation is enabled</output>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[7:0]">input signal representing the multiplicand with a data width of 8 bits</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[7:0]">input signal representing the multiplier with a data width of 8 bits</input>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[15:0]">product output signal with a data width of 16 bits</output>
    </ports>
    
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign>reg [1:0] mul_en_out_reg = {mul_en_out_reg[0], mul_en_in};</assign>
        <assign>mul_en_out = mul_en_out_reg[1];</assign>
        
        <assign>{temp[0][7], temp[0]} = {mul_b[0]?mul_a : 8'h0, 1'b0};</assign>
        <assign>{temp[1][7], temp[1]} = {mul_b[1]?{mul_a[7], mul_a} : 9'h0, 1'b0};</assign>
        <assign>{temp[2][7], temp[2]} = {mul_b[2]?{mul_a[7:6], mul_a[5:0]} : 10'h0, 1'b0};</assign>
        <assign>{temp[3][7], temp[3]} = {mul_b[3]?{mul_a[7:5], mul_a[4:0]} : 11'h0, 1'b0};</assign>
        <assign>{temp[4][7], temp[4]} = {mul_b[4]?{mul_a[7:4], mul_a[3:0]} : 12'h0, 1'b0};</assign>
        <assign>{temp[5][7], temp[5]} = {mul_b[5]?{mul_a[7:3], mul_a[2:0]} : 13'h0, 1'b0};</assign>
        <assign>{temp[6][7], temp[6]} = {mul_b[6]?{mul_a[7:2], mul_a[1:0]} : 14'h0, 1'b0};</assign>
        <assign>{temp[7][7], temp[7]} = {mul_b[7]?{mul_a[7], mul_a[6:0]} : 15'h0, 1'b0};</assign>
        
        <assign>{sum[0][8], sum[0]} = temp[0]+temp[1];</assign>
        <assign>{sum[1][9], sum[1]} = sum[0]+temp[2];</assign>
        <assign>{sum[2][10], sum[2]} = sum[1]+temp[3];</assign>
        <assign>{sum[3][11], sum[3]} = sum[2]+temp[4];</assign>
        <assign>{sum[4][12], sum[4]} = sum[3]+temp[5];</assign>
        <assign>{sum[5][13], sum[5]} = sum[4]+temp[6];</assign>
        <assign>{sum[6][14], sum[6]} = sum[5]+temp[7];
    </assign>
    
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)>
            <if condition="!rst_n">mul_a_reg <= 8'd0;</if>
            <else>mul_a_reg <= mul_a;</else>
        </always>
        
        <always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)>
            <if condition="!rst_n">mul_b_reg <= 8'd0;</if>
            <else>mul_b_reg <= mul_b;</else>
        </always>
        
        <always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)>
            <if condition="!rst_n">mul_out_reg <= 16'd0;</if>
            <else>mul_out_reg <= sum[6];</else>
        </always>
    </logic_description>
    
    <implementation>
        // input control
        reg [1:0] mul_en_out_reg;
        always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(!rst_n) begin
                mul_en_out_reg <= 2'b0;
            end else begin
                mul_en_out_reg <= {mul_en_out_reg[0], mul_en_in};
            end
        end
        
        assign mul_en_out = mul_en_out_reg[1];
        
        // input registers
        reg [7:0] mul_a_reg;
        reg [7:0] mul_b_reg;
        always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(!rst_n) begin
                mul_a_reg <= 8'd0;
                mul_b_reg <= 8'd0;
            end else begin
                if(mul_en_in == 1'b1) begin
                    mul_a_reg <= mul_a;
                    mul_b_reg <= mul_b;
                end
            end
        end
        
        
        // generate partial products
        wire [8:0] temp [7:0];
        assign {temp[0][7], temp[0]} = {mul_b_reg[0]?mul_a_reg : 8'h0, 1'b0};
        assign {temp[1][7], temp[1]} = {mul_b_reg[1]?{mul_a_reg[7], mul_a_reg} : 9'h0, 1'b0};
        assign {temp[2][7], temp[2]} = {mul_b_reg[2]?{mul_a_reg[7:6], mul_a_reg[5:0]} : 10'h0, 1'b0};
        assign {temp[3][7], temp[3]} = {mul_b_reg[3]?{mul_a_reg[7:5], mul_a_reg[4:0]} : 11'h0, 1'b0};
        assign {temp[4][7], temp[4]} = {mul_b_reg[4]?{mul_a_reg[7:4], mul_a_reg[3:0]} : 12'h0, 1'b0};
        assign {temp[5][7], temp[5]} = {mul_b_reg[5]?{mul_a_reg[7:3], mul_a_reg[2:0]} : 13'h0, 1'b0};
        assign {temp[6][7], temp[6]} = {mul_b_reg[6]?{mul_a_reg[7:2], mul_a_reg[1:0]} : 14'h0, 1'b0};
        assign {temp[7][7], temp[7]} = {mul_b_reg[7]?{mul_a_reg[7], mul_a_reg[6:0]} : 15'h0, 1'b0};
        
        
        // calculate partial sums
        reg [14:0] sum [6:0];
        always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(!rst_n) begin
                sum[0] <= 15'd0;
            end else begin
                sum[0] <= temp[0]+temp[1];
            end
        end
        
        always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(!rst_n) begin
                sum[1] <= 15'd0;
            end else begin
                sum[1] <= sum[0]+temp[2];
            end
        end
        
        always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(!rst_n) begin
                sum[2] <= 15'd0;
            end else begin
                sum[2] <= sum[1]+temp[3];
            end
        end
        
        always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(!rst_n) begin
                sum[3] <= 15'd0;
            end else begin
                sum[3] <= sum[2]+temp[4];
            end
        end
        
        always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(!rst_n) begin
                sum[4] <= 15'd0;
            end else begin
                sum[4] <= sum[3]+temp[5];
            end
        end
        
        always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(!rst_n) begin
                sum[5] <= 15'd0;
            end else begin
                sum[5] <= sum[4]+temp[6];
            end
        end
        
        always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(!rst_n) begin
                sum[6] <= 15'd0;
            end else begin
                sum[6] <= sum[5]+temp[7];
            end
        end
        
        // calculate product
        reg [15:0] mul_out_reg;
        always@(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(!rst_n) begin
                mul_out_reg <= 16'd0;
            end else begin
                mul_out_reg <= sum[6];
            end
        end
        
        // output assignment
        assign mul_out = mul_en_out?mul_out_reg : 16'd0;
    </implementation>
endmodule
